raw_reaction: Fourierの局所芽という見方は悪くないが、実質は因果芽畳み込みやLaplace再生測度の同じ核を記号で書いたものに近い。生涯忘れない別解とは言えない。
reason: The candidate correctly focuses on the local convolution germ before the uniform cutoff matters, but it overlaps strongly with existing causal-germ/Laplace renewal convolution solutions and does not merit the exact target line.
